title: GUARDS!!!
description: [gold]Transform[/gold] any number of cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] into [gold]Minion Sacrifice[/gold].
upgraded_description: [gold]Transform[/gold] any number of cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] into [gold]Minion Sacrifice+[/gold].
notes: When played, allows selecting any number of cards in hand to transform into Minion Sacrifice tokens. If this card is upgraded, the created tokens will be upgraded as well.
